nodes.label: AI as collaborative partner
nodes.label_negative: AI as fully autonomous worksheet creator
nodes.grounding_span: Collaborating back and forth sounds about right

nodes.label: AI as practical problem solver
nodes.grounding_span: I try to get AI to produce me new problems that would be appropriate for the topic

nodes.label: AI reliability for practical tasks
nodes.grounding_span: AI hallucination, but in practice I find this is rarely an issue with math nowadays

nodes.label: AI solution writing capability
nodes.grounding_span: I've tried at times in the past to get them to come up with solutions to the worksheets, but never to significant success

nodes.label: AI as learning and study aid
nodes.label_negative: AI as limited to teaching tasks
nodes.grounding_span: my hope is that it'll get to the point where I might be able to use it as a research aid

nodes.label: Educational quality and accuracy
nodes.grounding_span: I don't want to just regurgitate modified versions of them, since then there'd be no real reason for a lot of students to come to discussions

nodes.label: Professional efficiency
nodes.grounding_span: I think it's a useful tool

nodes.label: Learning and intellectual growth
nodes.grounding_span: my hope is that it'll get to the point where I might be able to use it as a research aid and solve advanced problems

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI as collaborative partner
nodes.grounding_span: Collaborating back and forth sounds about right

nodes.label: Reluctance to use AI for writing
nodes.grounding_span: I've tried at times in the past to get them to come up with solutions to the worksheets, but never to significant success

nodes.label: Cautious skepticism toward AI reliability
nodes.grounding_span: AI hallucination, but in practice I find this is rarely an issue with math nowadays

nodes.label: Aspirational hope for AI as practical assistant
nodes.grounding_span: my hope is that it'll get to the point where I might be able to use it as a research aid

nodes.label: Iterative refinement with limited back-and-forth
nodes.grounding_span: I check over each of the problems myself to make sure. Occasionally it takes a couple retries

nodes.label: Pragmatic acceptance of technological change
nodes.grounding_span: I feel that's the way progress is, and sometimes it leads to things like job loss. I think it'll be a while before that happens still, so I'm not too concerned
